(born December 18, 1983) is a [Canadian](/wiki/Canadians "Canadians") [mixed martial artist](/wiki/Mixed_martial_arts "Mixed martial arts") who formerly competed in the [bantamweight](/wiki/Bantamweight_(MMA) "Bantamweight (MMA)") division of the [Ultimate Fighting Championship](/wiki/Ultimate_Fighting_Championship "Ultimate Fighting Championship"). **Roland Camille Roger Delorme** (born December 18, 1983) is a [Canadian](/wiki/Canadians "Canadians") [mixed martial artist](/wiki/Mixed_martial_arts "Mixed martial arts") who formerly competed in the [bantamweight](/wiki/Bantamweight_(MMA) "Bantamweight (MMA)") division of the [Ultimate Fighting Championship](/wiki/Ultimate_Fighting_Championship "Ultimate Fighting Championship"). He was a competitor on [Spike TV](/wiki/Spike_TV "Spike TV")'s [The Ultimate Fighter: Team Bisping vs. Team Miller](/wiki/The_Ultimate_Fighter:_Team_Bisping_vs._Team_Miller "The Ultimate Fighter: Team Bisping vs. Team Miller").[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## MMA career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Roland_Delorme&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: MMA career")]

### Early career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Roland_Delorme&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Early career")]

Delorme amassed a 7–2 record before going on [The Ultimate Fighter](/wiki/The_Ultimate_Fighter "The Ultimate Fighter"), fighting exclusively in his native [Canada](/wiki/Canada "Canada").

### The Ultimate Fighter

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Roland_Delorme&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: The Ultimate Fighter")]

Delorme was picked last for Team Miller after beating B.J. Ferguson by triangle choke in the preliminary fights. He did not make the semi-finals, as he lost to [T.J. Dillashaw](/wiki/T.J._Dillashaw "T.J. Dillashaw") by submission at the end of the second round after being outwrestled and constantly being taken down throughout the fight.

### Ultimate Fighting Championship

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Roland_Delorme&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Ultimate Fighting Championship")]

Delorme fought Josh Ferguson at [The Ultimate Fighter 14 Finale](/wiki/The_Ultimate_Fighter_14_Finale "The Ultimate Fighter 14 Finale"), winning via submission in the third round.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

Delorme fought [Nick Denis](/wiki/Nick_Denis "Nick Denis") on May 5, 2012 at [UFC on Fox: Diaz vs. Miller](/wiki/UFC_on_Fox:_Diaz_vs._Miller "UFC on Fox: Diaz vs. Miller"), replacing an injured [Johnny Bedford](/wiki/Johnny_Bedford "Johnny Bedford").[[4]](#cite_note-BedfordOut/DelormeIn-4) He beat Denis by rear-naked choke at 4:59 of an action-packed first round where both fighters were rocked until Delorme rallied and submitted Denis.[[5]](#cite_note-5)

Delorme was briefly linked to a bout against promotional newcomer [Bibiano Fernandes](/wiki/Bibiano_Fernandes "Bibiano Fernandes") on July 21, 2012 at [UFC 149](/wiki/2012_in_UFC#UFC_149:_Faber_vs._Barão "2012 in UFC").[[6]](#cite_note-6) However, Fernandes did not sign with the UFC. Delorme instead faced [Francisco Rivera](/wiki/Francisco_Rivera_(fighter) "Francisco Rivera (fighter)") at the event.[[7]](#cite_note-7) He lost via KO at 4:19 of the first round. The result, however, was later changed to a No Contest when it was revealed Rivera had tested positive for a banned substance.[[8]](#cite_note-8)

Delorme faced [Edwin Figueroa](/wiki/Edwin_Figueroa "Edwin Figueroa") on June 15, 2013 at [UFC 161](/wiki/UFC_161 "UFC 161").[[9]](#cite_note-9) He won the exciting back-and-forth fight by unanimous decision.[[10]](#cite_note-10)

Delorme then faced [Alex Caceres](/wiki/Alex_Caceres "Alex Caceres") on September 21, 2013 at [UFC 165](/wiki/UFC_165 "UFC 165").[[11]](#cite_note-11) He lost the back-and-forth fight via split decision.[[12]](#cite_note-12)

Delorme was expected to face [Davey Grant](/wiki/Davey_Grant "Davey Grant") on March 8, 2014 at [UFC Fight Night 37](/wiki/UFC_Fight_Night_37 "UFC Fight Night 37").[[13]](#cite_note-13) However the fight was cancelled after the weigh ins the day before the event due to Grant suffering a torn meniscus.[[14]](#cite_note-14)[[15]](#cite_note-15)

Delorme faced promotional newcomer [Michinori Tanaka](/wiki/Michinori_Tanaka "Michinori Tanaka") on June 14, 2014 at [UFC 174](/wiki/UFC_174 "UFC 174").[[16]](#cite_note-16) He lost the fight via unanimous decision.[[17]](#cite_note-17)

Delorme next faced promotional newcomer [Ulka Sasaki](/wiki/Ulka_Sasaki "Ulka Sasaki") on August 23, 2014 at [UFC Fight Night 48](/wiki/UFC_Fight_Night_48 "UFC Fight Night 48").[[18]](#cite_note-18) He lost the fight via submission in the first round, and was subsequently released from the promotion shortly after.[[19]](#cite_note-19)
